Youth Growth Loan

The Youth Growth Loan is a working capital loan for youth-owned enterprises in Gauteng and Western Cape.

Eligibility

  • Applicants must be between 18 and 35 years old.
  • The business must be at least 51 percent youth-owned.
  • The enterprise must have traded for at least 1 year.

Funding

Loan sizes range from R500k to R5m.

Monthly repayments apply over 12 to 48 months.

Interest is linked to prime.

No equity is required.

Security may be required depending on the risk profile.

How to Apply

Apply online through the secure portal.

Apply online
